scripts.dev:app: cross-env ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs -r --parallel --filter @pomodoroz/shareables --filter @pomodoroz/renderer --filter pomodoroz run start:vite
scripts.dev:app:vite: cross-env ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs -r --parallel --filter @pomodoroz/shareables --filter @pomodoroz/renderer --filter pomodoroz run start:vite
scripts.prebuild: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter @pomodoroz/shareables run prepare && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run prepare
scripts.build:mwl: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:mwl
scripts.build:dir: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:dir
scripts.build:win: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:win
scripts.build:mac: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:mac
scripts.build:linux: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:linux
scripts.build:snap: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run build:snap
scripts.release:mw: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run release:mw
scripts.release: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs build && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run release
scripts.clean: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs -r --filter @pomodoroz/shareables --filter @pomodoroz/renderer --filter pomodoroz exec rimraf build dist
scripts.lint: node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter @pomodoroz/renderer run lint && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter pomodoroz run lint && node ./scripts/pnpmw.mjs --filter @pomodoroz/shareables run lint
